layman_headline: Crypto market is fearful and altcoins are bleeding — patience is the best trade right now.
layman_explanation: The overall crypto market is in a 'Fear' mood, with Bitcoin dominance at 56.2%, meaning money is flowing out of smaller coins and into Bitcoin. Most altcoin candidates on our watchlist are in downtrends with bearish chart structures. While a few coins like ZRO and TRUMP are approaching oversold territory, none of them have confirmed a reversal yet. Jumping in now would be catching a falling knife.
layman_action: Stay in cash and wait. The best swing trades come when fear peaks and prices show confirmed signs of bouncing — we're not there yet.
expert_reasoning: No candidate presents a compelling entry right now. ZRO is the most interesting with RSI at 31 and a 16.5x R/R ratio, but the chart bias is -0.70 (bearish), price is below all major MAs, and there's no bullish candlestick reversal pattern or MACD cross to confirm a bottom. TRUMP is deeply oversold (RSI 29) but the chart is equally bearish (-0.70) and the coin is down 97.8% from ATH — this is a structural decline, not a dip. ETHFI has the best chart bias (+0.60) with a Bullish Marubozu, but at $0.43 it's already very close to $0.40 resistance with only 0.11x R/R — terrible setup. The Fear & Greed improving from 23 to 26 is encouraging but not yet actionable. BTC dominance at 56.2% actively suppresses alt rallies.
risk_factors: BTC dominance at 56.2% means capital is rotating away from altcoins — any alt position faces structural headwinds
Fear & Greed at 26 is improving but could easily reverse if BTC drops below $63K
No swing candidate shows a confirmed bullish reversal pattern — all entries would be catching falling knives
watch_list: ZRO holding $0.90 support and forming a bullish reversal candle (hammer, morning star) — would trigger a BUY
Fear & Greed index crossing above 30 with BTC dominance declining below 55% — would signal alt-friendly conditions
BTC price action around $65K resistance — a breakout could lift the entire market and create alt opportunities
market_context: The crypto market is in a fear-driven consolidation phase with BTC at $64.3K and dominance at 56.2%. Altcoins are broadly underperforming with most candidates down 5-28% over 7 days, and no clear reversal signals have emerged yet.
context_banner: Market fear is improving but altcoin charts remain bearish — discipline demands waiting for confirmed reversal signals before deploying capital.

key_signals.description: Fear & Greed at 26 improving from 23 suggests bottoming sentiment, but not yet at levels that historically produce strong bounces (sub-20).
ZRO RSI at 31 and TRUMP RSI at 29 are approaching oversold, but neither has confirmed a reversal with a bullish candlestick pattern.
Bitcoin described as 'nearing late stages of bear market' by Jamie Coutts — suggests macro bottom forming but not yet confirmed, supporting patience.
ETHFI is the only candidate with a bullish chart bias (+0.60) and Bullish Marubozu candle, but its 0.11x risk/reward ratio at current price makes it a poor swing entry.
ETH derivatives reset narrative and Friday charts finding good news suggest institutional positioning for a reversal — worth monitoring for follow-through next week.
